since_last: 58% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.11%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC -2.47% · Gold +1.34% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 58% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.11%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.11%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.32%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +6.56%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +6.56%, CEVA +5.64%, TER +5.25%, AMAT +4.94%, LRCX +4.88%. Laggards: DDOG -4.75%, HON -1.90%, SAP -1.66%, PUBM -1.55%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.05% at $163.71
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
